---
title: ""
image: headshot.png
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: mastodon
      text: Mastodon
      href: https://mastodon.online/@michaelaye
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/michaelaye
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/kmichaelaye/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/michaelaye
    - icon: orcid.logo.icon.svg
      text: ORCiD
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-4088-1928
    - text: Google Scholar
      icon: google
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&tzom=-120&user=kDjSsIAAAAAJ&view_op=list_works&sortby=pubdate

toc: false
listing:
  contents: projects
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  # grid-columns: 1
---

I am a planetary scientist at Freie Universität Berlin, with a focus on Mars polar science, 
planetary instrumentation and their datasets, Saturn rings, Citizen Science, and complex data analytics, 
all sprinkled with AI.

## Projects
